text.title: MCP Basics: Model Context Protocol Server Development Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the mcp-basics methodology end-to-end.

step.name: init-package
step.action: `npm init -y && npm install @modelcontextprotocol/sdk zod` OR `pip install mcp-server-python pydantic`.

step.name: scaffold-one-tool
step.action: Implement exactly one tool with schema + handler. Reject multi-tool scaffolds.

step.name: wire-credentials
step.action: Use env vars for any secret. README documents `claude mcp add ... -e KEY=...`.

step.name: smoke-test-with-inspector
step.action: Run `mcp-inspector`. Confirm tool appears + schema validates + sample call returns a valid response.
step.decision-gate: If inspector fails, fix before sharing. Common errors: missing schema field, wrong transport name.

step.name: publish-or-share
step.action: Publish to npm/PyPI OR commit to a shared internal repo with one-liner install instructions.
step.output: Server reachable by team via `claude mcp add ...`.
